# harvester_kubeovn_vip (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_vip" "example" {
  name   = "example-vip"
  subnet = "example-subnet"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name
- `subnet` (String)

### Optional

- `attach_subnets` (List of String)
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `mac_address` (String)
- `selector` (List of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `type` (String)
- `v4_ip` (String)
- `v6_ip` (String)
- `vip_namespace` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_mac` (String)
- `status_type` (String)
- `status_v4_ip` (String)
- `status_v6_ip` (String)
